title: Witheringia pohliana
taxonomy: Witheringia pohliana is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade family. This plant is native to South America and belongs to the genus Witheringia. The classification of Witheringia pohliana places it in the kingdom Plantae, followed by the clade Angiosperms, and then the subclass Asteridae. Within the family Solanaceae, Witheringia pohliana is further classified into the subfamily Solanoideae. Further study is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships within the plant kingdom.
